notes: 4K professional PTZ camera; no rack units (surface, tripod, or inverted ceiling mount). RS-422 serial control uses a physical RJ45 connector, mapped to rs422. LAN port supports PoE+ as a power input alternative to the DC barrel.

ports.name: XLR Audio In 1
ports.note: Balanced; switchable Mic/Line level; +48V phantom power

ports.name: XLR Audio In 2
ports.note: Balanced; switchable Mic/Line level; +48V phantom power

ports.name: 3.5mm Audio In
ports.note: Stereo mini jack; unbalanced mic level

ports.name: LAN
ports.note: 1000Base-T; video streaming, VISCA/XC IP control, and PoE+ power input

ports.name: RS-422
ports.note: Physical connector is RJ45; legacy serial VISCA protocol

ports.name: USB
ports.note: Type-A; reserved for firmware and maintenance

ports.name: DC Power In
ports.note: 24V DC; for use with included AC adapter
